title: Skiing to the South Pole
story: Braving icy winds and treacherous terrain, two adventurous women made history in 1989. Ann Bancroft and Liv Arnesen became the first female team to ski all the way to the South Pole. These brave explorers showed the world that determination and teamwork can conquer even the harshest challenges on Earth.

activity_question: What milestone did Patrick Ewing reach for the New York Knicks?
follow_up_question: How many points did Ewing score in the game against Minnesota?

title: Rock Legends Join Hall of Fame
story: Music history rocked on January 17, 1996! The Rock and Roll Hall of Fame welcomed its 11th class of inductees. Iconic artists like David Bowie, Pink Floyd, and Gladys Knight and the Pips joined the ranks. These legends shaped the sound of rock, soul, and pop for generations. Their timeless tunes continue to inspire musicians today.
activity_question: Which of these artists was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame in 1996?
bonus_fact: The Rock and Roll Hall of Fame is a real museum you can visit in Cleveland, Ohio!
